title: ATLYSS
description:
Enter ATLYSS, a strange world thriving with creatures and critters! With the outside realm and dungeons deep ahead, there are plenty of locations to explore and discover. 

- Character Creation -Make your character with five playable races to choose from, with color, head, and body customization!

- Class Advancement -Start off as a witty Novice, destined to choose between three primary classes: 

• Fighter: The melee class that rends and staggers foes, dealing devastating damage and threat. 

• Mystic: The caster class that evokes powerful offensive and supportive arcane magic to their advantage. 

• Bandit: The acrobatic class that are experts of ranged weapons, traps, and quick melee attacks. 

- Play alone, or with Friends -Experience ATLYSS with friends online, or play solo-- no internet connection required! 

- Your character, saved locally -All of your character progression data is saved locally! Play a character solo, and join in later to a net-play session where you left off, and vice versa. 

- Questing Abound -Party up with friends and take on quests to slay creatures, discover new locations, and uncover the mystique of the shattered world.
description_short: Enter the world of ATLYSS, a Singleplayer/Online RPG where you can fight with or against friends in a surreal world filled with creatures beyond comprehension. Customize and progress your character(s), complete quests, and discover strange locations.
